ValidationRule.description: Error message to dealers when they try to edit a Quote that is Expired.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND( ISCHANGED(SBQQ__Status__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(SBQQ__Status__c),'Expired'), TEXT(SBQQ__Status__c) <> 'Expired' ), AND( ISCHANGED(SBQQ__Status__c) = FALSE, TEXT(SBQQ__Status__c)='Expired' ) ), OR( BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c , 'NATT_Units'), BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_BluEdge') ), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Quote has expired. If you need to edit it, please contact your admin.
